title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Barista Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Barista Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Barista Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barista Global Group:
Barista Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barista Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
